_meta.rules: NEVER remove or edit existing features. Only update 'passes' after verification. Add new features at the end.

features.description: Web app starts and serves pages on localhost:3000
steps: Check browser console for JS errors

features.description: Admin API starts and responds to health check on port 3080
Admin UI starts and serves dashboard on port 3081
Prisma client generates successfully and connects to database
GitHub Actions CI pipeline runs lint and tests on push
steps: Push a commit to a branch
Verify lint and test steps complete

features.description: Docker Compose builds and starts all services
steps: Verify services are reachable on expected ports

features.description: pnpm lint passes across entire workspace with zero errors
steps: Verify no warnings on critical rules

features.description: pnpm test:all passes across entire workspace
Fix apps/web DATABASE_URL from slimyai_prod to slimy and verify snail API/pages
steps: Update db name to slimy and host to 127.0.0.1

features.description: Update bot OPENAI_API_KEY on NUC1 and restart PM2 id 3 to fix OpenAI 401
/dream command uses only OpenAI images/generations (no invalid chat.completions preflight with dall-e-3)
steps: Open apps/bot/src/lib/images.ts and confirm generateImage() has no openai.chat.completions.create() call
Run pnpm --filter @slimy/bot build and verify exit code 0
Run pm2 restart slimy-bot-v2 and verify status online
Run direct node fetch test to https://api.openai.com/v1/images/generations and verify Status: 200

features.description: Push web audit commits, clean Next 16 warnings, preserve protected auth redirects, and verify custom 404 status
steps: Rebase local web audit commits on origin/main and push
Verify public pages return 200, /dashboard redirects unauthenticated, and unknown routes return 404

features.description: Clear lint warnings in the Snail club screenshot upload page without changing OCR workflow behavior
steps: Add missing scanProviders dependency to the push callback
Replace raw screenshot thumbnail img tag with next/image

features.description: Expand Snail docs and personal pages from placeholders into useful product surfaces
steps: QA /snail/club/screenshots route and API auth gates
Update OCR prompt for Power vs Sim Power sample screenshots
Document one metric type per upload batch
Preserve existing opposite metric when pushing one-metric screenshot batches
Replace /snail/personal placeholder with auth-aware personal command center
